did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The study utilized Vibrational Optical Coherence Tomography (VOCT), a physical diagnostic technology using infrared light and audible sound to measure resonant frequencies and elastic moduli. The results were obtained through direct physical measurements and statistical analysis of biomechanical properties, without the use of AI, machine learning, or deep learning algorithms.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
